$comment: Design token file for the Date Time Range Picker component
$description: Pair of date input fields displayed side by side. Each field shows a calendar icon followed by a MM / DD / YYYY placeholder in segmented format. Used as the trigger / manual-entry zone at the top of the Date Range Selector body. Width fits within the 393px sheet body (16px padding each side = 361px usable).

width.description: Total width of the two-field row (393px sheet minus 16px padding each side)

height.description: Taller than the standard 36px control height to accommodate date segments- xl - 48px

gap.description: 8px gap between the calendar icon and the date text segments- xs - 8px

size.description: 20px — calendar icon preceding the date segments- md - 20px

name.description: GHL icon name for the date input leading icon

typography.description: 16px Regular, 24px line-height — format hint text (MM / DD / YYYY)

color.description: Muted placeholder text color matching HighRise input/color/default/text/default- gray/500 - #667085

segment-gap.description: 4px gap between individual date segments (DD, /, MM, /, YYYY)- 3xs - 4px
